YOURS TRULY,

About Us

An online community radio based in Maastricht, dedicated to streaming the less-heard, and the off-kilter. Koska hopes to showcase vibrant scenes, locally and abroad, with its only ethos being: If it sounds good, then it is good. Our studio - still a work in progress - will be a space where people can enjoy music together, connect and have fun. If you feel like you can bring value to this radio - just get in touch.

CONTACT
